body.title: OBSERVE: augment grep patterns with interpretive_edges lookup
body.result: _CODE_EXPANSION static table (18 entries) + _expand_patterns_with_synonyms(): checks snake_case base patterns (substring) and raw description (whole-word) for expansion keys. Adds ≤2 extra grep patterns without LLM. Cap 4→6. 8 new tests. Committed 3b85d2ef.
body.description: pe_observe _extract_grep_patterns uses regex only. No semantic expansion. A ticket mentioning 'register' won't find registry.register. Add a fast interpretive_edges lookup (not word graph — wrong domain) to expand known code identifiers to their common co-occurrences. Adds 1-2 extra patterns without LLM.
